title: heterotheca pumila
intro: Heterotheca pumila, also known as the hairy false goldeneye, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heterotheca pumila include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
